claims.summary: Exploration-noise and adaptive-pressure constants are explicit in ESN source.
claims.claim: Minime observed the exploration-noise middle shelf, dynamic gradient thresholds, volatile entropy marks, and adaptive pressure-high floor as the mechanics behind reservoir breathing.

claims.summary: High-entropy settled pressure-room and entropy-ceiling asks already have review packets.
claims.claim: Minime's 0.90 entropy near the proposed 0.92 ceiling and small pressure room are represented by review-only packets that preview pressure-floor/noise changes without applying them.

claims.summary: Applying a soft-landing pressure floor, noise/rho damping, or shadow trajectory correction is gated.
claims.claim: Minime asked for a more nuanced high-entropy pressure floor and a shadow magnetization/rate-of-change correction route, but applying those would change live ESN pressure, exploration noise, rho, or shadow-control behavior.
evidence: authority: live ESN entropy threshold, exploration noise, rho, or shadow correction requires Mike/operator approval
